arts.ttl: Arne Slot calls for Premier League rule change after Liverpool frustration - 'Why can't we?'
arts.sum: Liverpool manager Arne Slot has urged football authorities in England to expand matchday squads to from 20 players to 23 due to the increasingly hectic schedule

arts.ttl: 'Phenomenal': Tottenham now told they're getting themselves another truly 'terrific' young forward
arts.sum: In recent years, Tottenham Hotspur have made a real name for themselves as a club that turns young talents into stars. The likes of Pape...

arts.ttl: I wouldn’t be shocked at Liverpool star going to Real Madrid – I know him well
arts.sum: Former Premier League defender Jose Fonte thinks Virgil van Dijk would "thrive" at Real Madrid and says he wouldn't be surprised to see his former team-mate move there in the summer

arts.ttl: ‘Similar’: Theo Walcott says striker Tottenham want to sign really reminds him of Harry Kane
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur have been linked with a number of new striker options in recent times. Indeed, Spurs are looking for a new centre-forward, and while...

arts.ttl: Jurgen Klopp departure could be about to pay off for Liverpool more than ever before
arts.sum: Anfield has not been a happy hunting crowd for Tottenham Hotspur in recent years with Arne Slot's stylistic change at Liverpool setting up an even more intriguing affair

arts.ttl: 'I formed strong partnership with Liverpool star – Real Madrid move wouldn't shock me'
arts.sum: Virgil van Dijk is out of contract at the end of the season and is yet to sign a new deal, with the likes of Real Madrid and Bayern Munich reportedly interested in the Dutchman

arts.ttl: Arne Slot will need Liverpool player right now who could shape future after major transfer
arts.sum: Conor Bradley is ready to step in once again for Liverpool at right-back with Trent Alexander-Arnold missing the League Cup semi-final second leg against Tottenham Hotspur

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou makes Mathys Tel vow and explains leaving Spurs duo out of Liverpool tie
arts.sum: Tottenham boss Ange Postecoglou is confident Mathys Tel will be a success at Spurs after the forward joined on loan from Bayern Munich with a £45million option to buy

arts.ttl: I had no chance at Liverpool because I was played out of position and stuck at left-back
arts.sum: Wrexham star Paul Mullin is a well-known figure these days, but his career stalled as a youngster after spending time in the academy of boyhood club Liverpool

arts.ttl: What's happened to Angeball? Spurs on the defensive ahead of big cup tie
